nasb.text: The priest shall then wave them with the bread of the first fruits for a wave offering with two lambs before the Lord; they are to be holy to the Lord for the priest.

esv.text: And the priest shall wave them with the bread of the firstfruits as a wave offering before the Lord, with the two lambs. They shall be holy to the Lord for the priest.

cnv.text: 祭司要把這些祭物與初熟祭的餅，一同作搖祭，在耶和華面前搖一搖，這些是耶和華的聖物，應歸給祭司。

ccb.text: 祭司要把这两只公绵羊和初熟之物做的饼作为摇祭在耶和华面前摇一摇。这些是献给耶和华的圣物，归祭司所有。
